text:
(a) The board by rule may provide for the private vendor to:

(1) sell at auction a license to display a unique alphanumeric pattern on a license plate for a period set by board rule;

(2) reserve an unissued alphanumeric pattern from the department for purposes of auctioning a license to display the pattern for a period set by board rule; and

(3) purchase from a customer an unexpired license to display an alphanumeric pattern for purposes of auction by the vendor.

(b) A license to display an alphanumeric pattern purchased under this section may be transferred to another person without payment of the fee provided by Section 504.855 (Transferability of Certain Patterns) .

(c) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(23), eff. January 1, 2012.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.854 — Auction

(a) The board by rule may provide for the private vendor to:

    (1) sell at auction a license to display a unique alphanumeric pattern on a license plate for a period set by board rule;

    (2) reserve an unissued alphanumeric pattern from the department for purposes of auctioning a license to display the pattern for a period set by board rule; and

    (3) purchase from a customer an unexpired license to display an alphanumeric pattern for purposes of auction by the vendor.

(b) A license to display an alphanumeric pattern purchased under this section may be transferred to another person without payment of the fee provided by Section 504.855 (Transferability of Certain Patterns) .

(c) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(23), eff. January 1, 2012.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 247(23), eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.label: a

sell at auction a license to display a unique alphanumeric pattern on a license plate for a period set by board rule;
reserve an unissued alphanumeric pattern from the department for purposes of auctioning a license to display the pattern for a period set by board rule; and
purchase from a customer an unexpired license to display an alphanumeric pattern for purposes of auction by the vendor.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A license to display an alphanumeric pattern purchased under this section may be transferred to another person without payment of the fee provided by Section 504.855 (Transferability of Certain Patterns) .

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(23), eff. January 1, 2012.
